---
name: St. Jerome

also_known_as:
  - Hieronymus
  - Eusebius Sophronius Hieronymus
dates: "c. 342-420"
role: Doctor of the Church, translator of the Vulgate Bible
related:

---

One of the four great Latin Doctors of the Church. Best known for his translation of the Bible into Latin (the Vulgate).

## References in Commentary

- `source.html#introduction-p2` — Most learned of the Fathers, devoted his life to Scripture
  text: "St. Jerome, that most learned of the Fathers, devoted his entire life to the translation and exposition of the Holy Bible"
- `source.html#authority-of-scripture-p3` — Ignorance of the Scriptures is ignorance of Christ
  text: "St. Jerome likewise affirms"
